featureDetection.rationale: Features the spec concept and explicitly documents Chrome 138 behavior, illustrating active prerender cancellation with an interactive timeline simulation.

gracefulFallback.rationale: The simulated timeline works cleanly and reliably on all browsers to illustrate the conceptual state-machine race condition.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Provides highly interactive step-by-step simulation of three distinct chronological scenarios with detailed logging and visualized outcome states.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Excellent and highly specific deep dive into the critical cart-mutation active prerender cancellation edge case.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Utilizes design system variables cleanly with colored indicator bars and excellent high-contrast styling.
